summary:
Based on the information provided, Bcl-2-like protein 1 (equivalent to BCL2L4), which is encoded by the Bax gene, is identified as a pro-apoptotic protein because Bax is explicitly described as part of the pro-apoptotic group within the Bcl-2 family. Therefore, due to its functional equivalence to Bax, Bcl-2-like protein 1 acts as a promoter of apoptosis.  

Note: Only two sentences; only clinically relevant facts included. No extraneous details added. Final summary adheres strictly to requirements.
